title: WaterSource: Reborn
description: A fork from watersource1.18.2 and upgrade to new version of minecraft.
body:
As the [origin mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/water-source) do.

*DO NOT REPORT BUGS TO ORIGIN MOD.*

Water Source Reborn adds little plentiful drinking and thirst systems into minecraft.

This fork is based of the 1.18.2 verison of [Water Source](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/water-source) and different from the [Water Source 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/watersource2)

Water Source have added some foods' water level compatibility with other mods.

You can also custom items' water levels through datapack as same as the 1.18.2 verion of [Water Source](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/water-source)
